---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `snippet ...`
2. Or inside Claude Code, type `/snippet ...`
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include full error output if available.

## Environment

- OS: (Windows 11 / macOS 14 / Ubuntu 22.04)
- Python version: (`python --version`)
- Claude Code version: (`claude --version`)
- snippet version: (`snippet version`)

## Additional context

Paste any relevant config or snippets.json content (remove sensitive data).
